params.name: Babbage Engine
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
params.description:
On Apr 27, 1847 AD, Babbage invented this machine that almost changed the world. The Difference Engine is the result of Babbage's lifelong research. This is not an ordinary calculator. It's a machine used to tabulate polynomial functions.

Unfortunately, Babbage couldn't find anyone willing to contribute to his work, so Difference Engine No. 2 stayed on paper. More than a hundred years later, the machine was recreated from his design. Although it is no match for today's computers, it's still abl …
